requirement.description: The braking controller shall ensure that all wheel speed values are updated at a consistent rate suitable for vehicle dynamics and speed correlation.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify ABS wheel speed message periodicity.
test_steps: Measure time delta between consecutive frames
test_cases.expected_result: Message cycle time remains within ±20% tolerance
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_abs_005_message_cycle_time(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_ABS_WHEEL_INFO, 2)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    timestamps = [msg.timestamp for msg in msgs]
    deltas = [(timestamps[i+1] - timestamps[i]) * 1000 for i in range(len(timestamps)-1)]
    for delta in deltas:
        assert 8 <= delta <= 12

test_cases.test_objective: Verify all four wheel speeds update every cycle.
test_steps: Compare wheel speed values across frames
test_cases.expected_result: No missed or stale wheel speed updates
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_abs_006_wheel_updates(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_ABS_WHEEL_INFO, 2)
    fl = [decode_fl_speed(m) for m in msgs]
    assert len(set(fl)) > 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify synchronous update of all wheel speeds.
test_steps: Compare timestamps of wheel speed signals
test_cases.expected_result: All wheel speeds update in the same CAN frame
